import io
import string
import list

fn main() -> Result<Unit, String>
  let line = io.read_line().ok_or("no input")?
  let tokens = string.split_whitespace(line)
  let n = tokens.len()
  if n == 0
    Err("no input")
  else
    mut best = 0
    mut best_abs = 0
    mut have = false
    mut i = 0
    while i < n
      let tok = tokens.get(i).ok_or("bug")?
      let v = string.parse_int(tok).ok_or("parse error")?
      mut a = v
      if a < 0
        a = 0 - a
      end
      if not have
        best = v
        best_abs = a
        have = true
      else
        if a < best_abs
          best = v
          best_abs = a
        end
      end
      i = i + 1
    end
    println("min_abs=#{best}")
    Ok(())
  end
end
